reviews.author: Angi verified customer
reviews.text: The driveway looks great and it's leveled. We live on a busy street, and they did an awesome job making sure traffic went smooth. I would definitely hire them again and refer others to them.

reviews.author: Angi verified customer
reviews.text: I am so happy with my driveway addition. It was fast and EXACTLY what I wanted. I would absolutely hire him and his company again. The price was very reasonable for what I wanted.

reviews.text: Doctor Concrete were fantastic. Quote on Wednesday and poured concrete on Friday. It looks great.

reviews.author: Angi verified customer
reviews.text: Contractors completed our project as advertised. The team was pleasant and professional always keeping me informed. Their commitment to the project was impeccable. They kept to our agreed schedule and kept me informed throughout the project.

reviews.author: Angi verified customer
reviews.text: Good experience. Daily communication on when they would arrive and the work that would get accomplished. Work met and even exceeded expectations.

reviews.author: Angi verified customer
reviews.text: The team came in and got the job done in one day. The driveway looks great and is leveled.

reviews.author: Anthony F.
reviews.text: Contractors completed our project as advertised. The team was pleasant and professional always keeping me informed. Their commitment to the project was impeccable. They kept to our agreed schedule and kept me informed throughout the project. They replaced the entire concrete "pad" on one side of my pool. During one weather issue, the team was in constant contact as they rescheduled the completion of the project. I am recommending this contractor for all of your concrete needs. I will be using them on a couple of other projects and highly recommend them to others for their needs.

reviews.author: Jeff
reviews.text: This was a good experience. I received daily communication on when they would arrive and the work that would get accomplished. Work met and even exceeded my expectation. If you want a contract company that does what they say and has exceptional communication you want Dr. Concrete ATL LLC.

reviews.author: Gayelle A.
reviews.text: The team came in and got the job done in one day. The driveway looks great and it's leveled. We live on a busy street, and they did an awesome job making sure traffic went smooth. I would definitely hire them again and refer others to them. Great work guy!!
